zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Morville於大約1220年出生在英國時，她的父親Baron Ives de Morville12歲，母親Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall-1歲。她於1253年8月18日與Sir Ralph Gorges在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年2月8日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Morville于大约1220年出生在英国时，她的父亲Baron Ives de Morville12岁，母亲Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall-1岁。她于1253年8月18日与Sir Ralph Gorges在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年2月8日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Morville was born about 1220, in England, her father, Baron Ives de Morville, was 12 and her mother, Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall, was -1. She married Sir Ralph Gorges on 18 August 1253, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 8 February 1292, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Morville est née environ 1220, à Angleterre, son père, Baron Ives de Morville, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall, avait -1 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Gorges le 18 août 1253, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 février 1292, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Morville um 1220 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron Ives de Morville 12 und ihre Mutter Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall -1. Sie hat am 18. August 1253 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Gorges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Februar 1292 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Morville è nata il circa 1220 nel England, sua padre, Baron Ives de Morville, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall, aveva -1 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Gorges il 18 agosto 1253, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 8 febbraio 1292, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Morvilleが約1220年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Baron Ives de Morvilleは12歳，母Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhallは-1歳であった。1253年8月18日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでSir Ralph Gorgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年2月8日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Morville(이)가 대략 1220년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron Ives de Morville(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall(은)는 -1세였다. 그녀는 1253년 8월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Sir Ralph Gorges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 2월 8일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Ives de Morville, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall, tinha -1 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Gorges em 18 de agosto de 1253, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de fevereiro de 1292, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Morville родилась около 1220 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Baron Ives de Morville было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Elizabeth de Wraxhall, -1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Gorges 18 августа 1253 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 8 февраль 1292 г. в её родном городе.
